name: Filomena Rodriguez Market St. Meatloaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the onions, scallions, carrots, celery, bell peppers, and garlic in butter until tender.
2. Combine salt, white pepper, black pepper, cayenne pepper, cumin, nutmeg, eggs, ketchup, half-and-half, ground beef, sausage, and breadcrumbs in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Place the meat mixture into a baking dish and place the dish inside a large pan filled with boiling water until halfway up the sides of the baking dish.
4. Bake at 375°F for 45 to 50 minutes.
5. Remove the baking dish from the water bath and let it rest for 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
This recipe yields 8-10 portions.
